title: Everything is Wool (EIW)
description: If Minecraft had a free edition... This would be it
body:
# 🧶Everythin' is Wool 

Items, blocks, particles, entitys, gui

## 🌟 What does EIW adds?
👉 "Simpleness" into your world. *(it's a word trust)*

👉 Unrealistic looks. *(I mean... Uhh)*

👉 Everything is Wool *(As the name mentions)*

## 🌟 Why should i download EIW 
Vanilla Minecraft can be boring sometimes, so why not make it even more boring? Because, well... why not?

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c94efd5c2b76136c523f3d9bda8cc3ef01f94a4.png)
